author.name: dietrich

content.text:
🛋 Sit down in your favorite place...

🍵☕️🍺🍷🚰 with whatever favorite comforting beverage you prefer...

and let us know what you think the most important thing 2020 needs from a decentralized p2p file storage and publishing toolkit like IPFS.

author.bio: @IPFSbot Project Lead and PM @ProtocolLabs. Building #Web3 to be #p2p & #OfflineFirst. Former (A)PM @Google on #GoogleSearch, #GoogleClassroom, #GoogleForms.
author.name: Molly

content.text: Excited about using/improving @IPFSbot? We’re looking for next year's theme suggestions (https://github.com/ipfs/roadmap/blob/master/2020-IPFS-Project-Planning.md) & would love to hear your thoughts on where the core implementations / IPFS working groups should be investing more energy in 2020! Share your ideas before Nov 8!👂🚀
